text: Entering through the dim corridor, I sense a blend of anticipation and subtle apprehension—uncertainty marked by the stark lighting and the emptiness beyond the glass. Yet, as I step into the exhibition space with its vivid wall and "R+D" proclamation, I feel curiosity taking root. The intellectual energy of research and development pulses through the screens and displays. Here, I am reminded that knowledge grows in the convergence of the unfamiliar and the illuminated. I find myself quietly inspired and ready to encounter new ideas.
